case_title: SUSAN WOLFF VS. STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SUSAN WOLFF.
